transcript: Speaker A: Sorry sir, I thought you told me to remove this. Speaker B: Wow, that's so amazing. I wish I have that kind of confidence. Speaker A: What about you Santosh? No such shenanigans with the boss. Speaker C: My nani not know boss. Speaker A: What? What does your nani have to do with this? Speaker A: Hey, boss is there. I will just go say hi to him. Speaker C: Yaar, mujhe nahi lagta ki ye networking mujhse ho payegi. Aur meri English... [Friend, I don't think I can do this networking. And my English...] Speaker B: Suno, SpeakX try karo. Uske AI teacher hai Sia. Uske sath apni English speaking practice karo. Bas 15 minutes agar tum din ke daily doge na, to sab kuch seekh jaoge. Don't worry. [Listen, try SpeakX. Its AI teacher is Sia. Practice your English speaking with her. If you just give 15 minutes daily, you will learn everything. Don't worry.] Speaker C: Sach mein? [Really?] Speaker B: Haan, maine khud try kiya hai yahan aane se pehle. [Yes, I tried it myself before coming here.] Speaker C: Okay, main try karta hoon. [Okay, I will try.] Speaker C: So, what did I miss? Speaker A: I was telling Disha about boss, shenanigans, not your nani, okay? Speaker C: Sorry, last time I just got so frustrated that you were speaking to me. Speaker A: Oh, well, you can always come to me if you need help. Speaker C: I really appreciate that. Thank you. Speaker B: Waah mere sher, kya maska lagaya hai! [Wow my tiger, what a smooth talker!] Speaker C: Credit to you and Sia. Speaker D: SpeakX ki AI teacher Sia ke sath aap bhi apni English speaking mein confidence aur fluency develop kar sakte hain. Aapko milegi daily guidance, real-time feedback, aur ek judgment-free environment 24/7, jab chahein, jahan chahein. To aaj hi download kariye SpeakX aur apne sapno ko kariye haasil. [With SpeakX's AI teacher Sia, you too can develop confidence and fluency in your English speaking. You will get daily guidance, real-time feedback, and a judgment-free environment 24/7, whenever and wherever you want. So download SpeakX today and achieve your dreams.]
on_screen_text: SORRY SIR, I THOUGHT YOU TOLD ME TO REMOVE THIS. WOW, THAT'S SO AMAZING. I WISH I HAVE THAT KIND OF CONFIDENCE. WHAT ABOUT YOU SANTOSH? NO SUCH SHENANIGANS WITH THE BOSS. MY NANI NOT KNOW BOSS. WHAT? WHAT DOES YOUR NANI HAVE TO DO WITH THIS? HEY, BOSS IS THERE. I WILL JUST GO SAY HI TO HIM. YAAR, I THINK I CAN'T ABLE TO DO THIS NETWORKING. AND MY ENGLISH... LISTEN TRY SPEAK X THE TEACHER FOR SPEAK X IS AI HER NAME IS SIA PRACTICE ENGLISH SPEAKING WITH SIA JUST TRY THIS FOR ONLY 15 MINUTES PER DAY YOU WILL LEARN EVERYTHING DON'T WORRY. REALLY? YAA I TRIED BEFORE I AM JOINING HERE OKAY I WILL TRY THIS. Meet SIA Your personal AI Teacher. SO, WHAT DID I MISS? I WAS TELLING DISHA ABOUT BOSS, SHENANIGANS, NOT YOUR NANI, OKAY? SORRY, LAST TIME I JUST GOT SO FRUSTED THAT YOU WERE SPEAKING TO ME. OH, WELL, YOU CAN ALWAYS COME TO ME IF YOU NEED HELP. I REALLY APPRECIATE THAT. THANK YOU. WOW MAN YOU JUST NAILED IT. CREDIT TO YOU AND SIA. SpeakX. Meet SIA Your personal AI Teacher. Everyday Life: Daily English. Grammar. Real-life Conversation. Revise and Practice. Speak with AI. Vocabulary. Listen and Select. Bye! Hello! Select the word you hear. Congratulations! You have successfully completed this Lesson. SpeakX.
summary: A young professional struggles to speak English confidently with his boss, leading to an embarrassing misunderstanding. His colleague recommends using the SpeakX app to practice with its AI teacher, Sia. After practicing daily, he successfully converses with his boss and improves his professional networking skills.
